item.title: Curated Gitbooks
item.description: Wheel of Heaven believes in the democratization of information and is interested in maintaining and hosting as many original sources as possible. As a result, we are pleased to provide a small subset of books that we deem important for the proper propagation and contextualization of the premises proposed by Wheel of Heaven. These books are all accessible as so-called Gitbooks, which means that these books are versioned and hosted with the infamous Git technology, a distributed version control system.

item.title: Hello World!👋
item.description: Introducing Doks, a Hugo theme helping you build modern documentation websites that are secure, fast, and SEO-ready — by default.

item.title: Further reading
item.description: These links should help you dig deeper: Internet Sacred Text Archive
